name: reefapi/reefapi-mcp
description: One MCP for 160+ live web-data APIs — search engines, social (Reddit, TikTok, Threads, Bluesky), e-commerce (Amazon, eBay, AliExpress, Etsy), real estate (Zillow, Redfin), jobs, travel, news, finance and company/people intel. Clean JSON from sites that block scrapers; one key, one shared credit pool, free tier. Remote streamable-http at api.reefapi.com/mcp.
